uuid/SafeUUID/safe.name: safe
uuid/SafeUUID/safe.description: The UUID was generated by the platform in a multiprocessing-safe way.

info.excerpt: The UUID was generated by the platform in a multiprocessing-safe way.

uuid/SafeUUID.name: SafeUUID
uuid/SafeUUID.description: Added in version 3.7. safe¶ The UUID was generated by the platform in a multiprocessing-safe way. unsafe¶ The UUID was not generated in a multiprocessing-safe way. unknown¶ The platform does not provide information on whether the UUID was generated safely or not.
